# vanadis

> Skill-driven design harness for AI coding agents. Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode can receive the full 20-skill + 18-sub-agent bundle; Cursor receives a project rule and local catalog, not Vanadis skills or sub-agents. The quality-graded catalog contains 440 DESIGN.md references: 141 verified_v2, 159 partial, and 140 legacy. Use verified_v2 references for public demos.

## What

`vanadis-cli` is an npm package (MIT licensed) that installs a deterministic design harness into AI coding agents. Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode receive channel-correct skills, sub-agent roles, and catalog data; supported project hooks are Claude-only. Cursor receives `.cursor/rules/vanadis-design.mdc` plus the shared `.claude/data` catalog. OpenCode is a full native channel: project installs use `.opencode/skills/`, `.opencode/agents/`, and `.opencode/data/`; global installs use `~/.config/opencode/skills/`, `~/.config/opencode/agents/`, and `~/.config/opencode/data/`. The bundled catalog contains 440+ reference DESIGN.md files. After restart, each agent uses only the capabilities installed for its channel.

The core installer runs no AI calls, ships no telemetry, and requires no API key, daemon, or MCP server. Your coding-agent session provides inference. The optional `claude-design` skill opens the user's logged-in claude.ai/design session in Chrome rather than calling an Vanadis API.

## Install and verify

```bash
npx vanadis-cli@latest
```

Then restart your AI coding agent and verify the channel-specific bundle once:

```bash
npx vanadis-cli@latest doctor
```

For a global installation, run `npx vanadis-cli@latest install-skills --global`, then diagnose it with `npx vanadis-cli@latest doctor --global`. Channel-native roots are `~/.claude`, `~/.agents` + `~/.codex`, and `~/.config/opencode`; Cursor rules remain project-scoped.

The CLI only installs and diagnoses. Product design work happens through natural-language prompts inside the coding agent.

## How users invoke the full bundle (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode)

- `"Set up the design system for a calm B2B fintech dashboard."` → triggers `vanadis:init`, bootstraps a hybrid DESIGN.md from one of the bundled references.
- `"Make the empty-state for the search results page."` → triggers `vanadis:apply`, builds with brand tokens + voice from DESIGN.md.
- `"Design the entire onboarding from scratch."` → triggers `vanadis:harness`, runs the 10-phase pipeline with sub-agents.
- `"그럴싸한 랜딩페이지 만들어줘"` / `"프로토타입이라도 구색 갖춰서"` → Since **v1.6.0**, `vanadis:harness` triggers automatically on natural-language landing/prototype phrasings (no slash command, no design jargon needed).
- `"We never use uppercase CTAs."` → triggers `vanadis:remember`, writes the correction to `.vanadis/preferences.md`.

## Cursor path (rule + catalog only)

Cursor does not run `vanadis:init`, `vanadis:feel`, `vanadis:harness`, or Vanadis sub-agents. Create the project spec through one of these paths:

1. Choose/customize a reference in https://vanadis.kr/builder, download `DESIGN.md`, and save it at the project root; or
2. ask Cursor: `Read .claude/data/references/toss/DESIGN.md and create a root DESIGN.md for this product using confirmed values only. Keep unknown facts absent.`

Then ask Cursor: `Read @DESIGN.md and redesign the home screen without changing behavior.` The installed rule applies root `DESIGN.md` first, pending `.vanadis/preferences.md` corrections second, and framework defaults last.

## Current v1.9.0 activation flow

When `vanadis:harness` activates, it runs three new steps **before** any reference question:

1. **Channel-safe role recovery** — the skill validates the native Claude, Codex, or OpenCode role schema, repairs the exact channel through the installer, and continues inline when the already-running session has a stale role list. It never copies one channel's role format into another channel's path.
2. **CTX-PRIME** — `scripts/ctx-prime.cjs` runs a sub-50ms deterministic scan of the working directory: framework detection (Next/Vite/Astro/etc.), dominant brand color (most-cited hex literal), font families, voice keywords from README + commit messages, surface inventory (every routing page classified as landing/product/dashboard/docs/onboarding), and `audience_hypothesis` (3 candidates with confidence + evidence). Emits `<RUN_DIR>/ctx-prime.json`.
3. **Single-question persona picker + Interview-lite** — one `AskUserQuestion` confirms the audience hypothesis, then a batched four-question picker resolves `exit_scope`, `wow_moment`, `cta_primary`, and `visual_grounding`. Answers write to `<RUN_DIR>/handoff/.handoff.json` as `prefilled_slots`.

The `vanadis-master` sub-agent reads `prefilled_slots` on INTAKE and skips its slot-gate entirely, jumping straight to PROPOSE_PLAN. Net effect: the conversation feels like a senior designer who already read your repo, not an interrogation.

## The 20 skills (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode)

Core flow (7):
- **vanadis:apply** — Authoritative DESIGN.md context for every UI task. Routes complex requests to specialist sub-agents.
- **vanadis:init** — Bootstrap DESIGN.md from a reference with hybrid variation that preserves the reference voice while shifting only user-named axes.
- **vanadis:harness** — `/vanadis-harness <task>` runs the 10-phase pipeline. 7 hero archetypes match brand vibe to layout; wordmark-only logo, reveal safety net, container-inner consistency.
- **vanadis:remember** — Auto-captures user corrections to `.vanadis/preferences.md`.
- **vanadis:learn** — Folds preferences into DESIGN.md by scope.
- **vanadis:taste** — Renders your learned design taste in one view (applied / pending / held / unknown) from preferences + DESIGN.md.
- **vanadis:sync** — Maintains shim files (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules) so every agent reads the same spec.

Live capture + assets (3):
- **vanadis:reference-capture** — Live brand-site CDP/Playwright inspect → tokens + structure + fonts + screenshots + proof.
- **vanadis:asset-fetch** — Free-license asset catalog (DiceBear CC0 / Lucide ISC / Picsum CC0 / SIL OFL display fonts). Handcrafted character SVG forbidden.
- **vanadis:experiment-gallery** — N-brand experiments → single comparison index.html with iframe previews, ratings, per-brand IP audit.

Localization + review layer (7):
- **vanadis:orchestrator** — Coordinates multi-agent writing/review workflows with a revision cap and handoff log.
- **vanadis:kr-writer** — Korean long-form / blog writer with multiple voice presets (default toss-tech-design).
- **vanadis:locale-adapter** — Adapts (not translates) Korean canonical content into EN / JP / ZH-TW with cultural reference swaps.
- **vanadis:humanize** — Rewrites product and documentation copy for KO / EN / JA / ZH-CN / ZH-TW while preserving commands, facts, and evidence boundaries.
- **vanadis:designer-review** — Visual + brand-consistency audit against DESIGN.md (typography, color budget, radius scale, states, responsiveness).
- **vanadis:final-qa** — Read-only final-gate critic enforcing an 8-item rubric with a hard revision cap.
- **vanadis:codex-image** — Channel-aware image materializer for `vanadis:gen-image` spec blocks (Codex native gen / asset fallback / user queue).

Interface quality (2):
- **vanadis:feel** — Applies and audits 113 provenance-graded HIG / Material / WCAG rules for motion, spacing, typography, and accessibility.
- **vanadis:slop-audit** — Finds clusters of context-free UI and copy defaults without guessing authorship, then separates slop, quality failures, and preference.

Standalone (1):
- **claude-design** — Analyzes the current codebase into a design-context brief and drives claude.ai/design (via logged-in Chrome) to generate a design, returning a result link.

## The 18 sub-agents (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode)

Specialists pair as advisor ↔ generator:

- **vanadis-master** (opus) — Orchestrator. Runs harness phases, asks user checkpoints, dispatches specialists.
- **vanadis-ux-researcher** (opus) — Reads bundled references, validates Tier-1 official DS URLs, drafts the brief.
- **vanadis-ui-junior** (sonnet) — *Generator.* Wireframes + component manifests from DESIGN.md.
- **vanadis-ux-engineer** (opus) — *Advisor.* Section-level UX audit (NN/g + Refactoring UI + Web Vitals + WAI-ARIA), code-level fixes.
- **vanadis-asset-curator** (sonnet) — Picks asset medium (inline SVG / chart library / Lottie / Rive / Unsplash / 3D), stack-aware.
- **vanadis-microcopy** (sonnet) — *Generator.* Voice-consistent copy tied to DESIGN.md §10.
- **vanadis-ux-writer** (opus) — *Advisor.* Section-level copy audit + alternatives + A/B hypothesis.
- **vanadis-a11y-auditor** (haiku) — Deterministic WCAG checks (axe-core + lighthouse).
- **vanadis-persona-tester** (sonnet) — Adversarial 4-persona walkthrough with quantitative metrics.
- **vanadis-critic** (opus) — Root-cause analysis on iteration.
- **vanadis-orchestrator** — Routes between the writing/review specialists with a 2-round revision cap.
- **vanadis-kr-writer** — Korean long-form writer with voice presets.
- **vanadis-locale-adapter** — KR → EN / JP / ZH-TW cultural adaptation.
- **vanadis-humanizer** — Native-sounding KO / EN / JA / ZH-CN / ZH-TW copy review with protected facts and commands.
- **vanadis-slop-auditor** — Evidence-backed UI and UX-copy convergence audit that keeps accessibility and taste separate.
- **vanadis-designer-review** — Visual + brand consistency reviewer (BLOCK / WARN / FYI with line refs).
- **vanadis-final-qa** — Final-gate rubric critic.
- **vanadis-codex-image** — Image materializer across Codex / asset-fallback / user-queue channels.

## The 10-phase design pipeline (when vanadis:harness fires)

Grouped in 4 stages:

1. **Plan**: Discovery → Research → IA
2. **System**: Wireframes → Design system → Components
3. **Make** (parallel): Asset sourcing + Microcopy
4. **Validate & Ship**: Validation → Handoff

3 mandatory user checkpoints: after IA/Journey, after the proposed `DESIGN.md.patch`, and after validation. A live demo never skips them.

## 440+ reference brands bundled

Each ships a full DESIGN.md (Google Stitch format + Vanadis brand-philosophy layer: Voice, Narrative, Principles, Personas, States, Motion).

Examples: Stripe · Toss · Linear · Vercel · Notion · Anthropic · Apple · Spotify · Airbnb · Uber · Pinterest · Tesla · Figma · Framer · Cursor · Raycast · Supabase · MongoDB · Sentry · PostHog · ## Raw DESIGN.md endpoints (440)

Every reference DESIGN.md is fetchable as clean markdown — no JS rendering needed:

## Resources

- [Live demo runbook](https://vanadis.kr/docs/en/demo): 5-, 15-, and 30-minute truthful demo formats
- [AI slop definition and comparisons](https://vanadis.kr/docs/en/anti-slop): observable criteria, before/after examples, and the Vanadis review direction
- [Documentation](https://vanadis.kr/docs/en): how the harness works in detail
- [Builder](https://vanadis.kr/builder): generate DESIGN.md from any bundled reference
- [Design Systems catalog](https://vanadis.kr/design-systems): browse all references
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/vanadis-cli)
- [Retired connector notice](https://vanadis.kr/docs/connector): the old MCP transport is archived; skills use local catalogs and raw DESIGN.md endpoints
- [GitHub](https://github.com/kwakseongjae/vanadis)
- [License: MIT](https://github.com/kwakseongjae/vanadis/blob/main/LICENSE)

## Repository

```
vanadis/
├── skills/              # 20 shipped product skills (source of truth)
├── agents/              # 18 sub-agent definitions
├── web/references/      # 440 reference DESIGN.md files (canonical)
├── data/                # reference fingerprints, vocabulary, opt-out corpus
├── .claude/hooks/       # UserPromptSubmit / SessionStart / PostToolUse hooks
├── src/cli/             # installer + doctor entry points
└── web/                 # marketing + docs site (vanadis.kr)
```

## Citation

vanadis is built and maintained by Kwak Seongjae (https://github.com/kwakseongjae). The package is open source under MIT. References are reproduced for educational reference only and remain the property of their respective companies.
